title: Managing notifications
description: How to control push notifications and email alerts from WagerProof.

content.text: WagerProof may send notifications for important updates like new picks from your AI Agents, game alerts, or product announcements.
You can manage push notification permissions in your device settings. On iOS, go to Settings > Notifications > WagerProof. On Android, go to Settings > Apps > WagerProof > Notifications.
Email preferences can be managed from your Account settings within the app. You can opt out of marketing emails while still receiving essential account-related communications.
